purpose: Public-safe evidence summaries for blocker resolution gates. Copy this file to PUBLIC_SAFE_BLOCKER_EVIDENCE.json only after operator evidence exists.

criteriaEvidence.publicSafeEvidence: Summarize the owner-verified connector installation result without tokens or screenshots containing secrets.
criteriaEvidence.evidenceReference: GitHub issue #2 comment or PR note URL

criteriaEvidence.criterion: MCP onboarding no longer reports organization access as blocked.
criteriaEvidence.publicSafeEvidence: Summarize the MCP onboarding route result without raw auth headers or session material.
criteriaEvidence.evidenceReference: GitHub issue #2 comment or PR note URL

criteriaEvidence.criterion: GET /git/repos can include organization repositories after authentication.
criteriaEvidence.publicSafeEvidence: Summarize the repository visibility check without credentials.
criteriaEvidence.evidenceReference: GitHub issue #2 comment or PR note URL

criteriaEvidence.criterion: No raw token was copied into Git, logs, screenshots or generated artifacts.
criteriaEvidence.publicSafeEvidence: State that the operator reviewed the public artifacts and found no raw credential material.
criteriaEvidence.evidenceReference: GitHub issue #2 comment or PR note URL

criteriaEvidence.publicSafeEvidence: State that private inventory exists in the approved operational location without naming private paths.
criteriaEvidence.evidenceReference: GitHub issue #3 comment or PR note URL

criteriaEvidence.criterion: Backup or export reference exists outside Git.
criteriaEvidence.publicSafeEvidence: State that backup/export references exist outside Git without publishing private locations.
criteriaEvidence.evidenceReference: GitHub issue #3 comment or PR note URL

criteriaEvidence.publicSafeEvidence: State that rollback references exist outside Git without publishing raw commands or private paths.
criteriaEvidence.evidenceReference: GitHub issue #3 comment or PR note URL

criteriaEvidence.criterion: Operator approval scope and date are recorded without secrets.
criteriaEvidence.publicSafeEvidence: State the public-safe approval scope and date without identity secrets or private operational detail.
criteriaEvidence.evidenceReference: GitHub issue #3 comment or PR note URL

criteriaEvidence.criterion: No production deletion, migration, service stop or vhost change has occurred before approval.
criteriaEvidence.publicSafeEvidence: State that no production-affecting action occurred before approval.
criteriaEvidence.evidenceReference: GitHub issue #3 comment or PR note URL
